text:
A facility/unit that moves from place-to-place equipped to provide preventive, 
screening, diagnostic, and/or treatment services. 

16 = Temporary Lodging. A short-term accommodation such as a hotel, campground, hostel, cruise 
ship or resort where the patient receives care, and which is not identified by any other POS 
code. 

17 = Walk-in Retail Health Clinic. A walk-in health clinic, other than an office, urgent care facility, 
pharmacy or independent clinic and not described by any other
